originalTitle: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
content: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.

originalTitle: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
title: Desperate for food, drought-stricken Kenyans turn to the gingerbread tree
content: Some 26 million people are "facing extreme hunger" in Kenya, Ethiopia and Somalia, warns humanitarian organisation Oxfam.

originalTitle: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
title: UK agrees deal to ease migrant returns to Nigeria
content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: Japan beat Australia to lift Women’s Asian Cup title
title: Japan beat Australia to lift Women’s Asian Cup title
content: Japan edges tournament hosts Australia 1-0 in ⁠the Women's ⁠Asian Cup final to claim third title in four editions.

originalTitle: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility
title: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility
content: No leakage of radioactive materials reported in the area in central Iran, Tehran's atomic energy organisation says.

originalTitle: US jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase
title: US jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase
content: Jury finds that two tweets posted in May 2022 by Musk contained false statements.

originalTitle: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
content: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

originalTitle: First photos as BTS make live return in front of huge crowd
title: First photos as BTS make live return in front of huge crowd
content: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook perform together for the first time since October 2022.

originalTitle: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
content: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

originalTitle: Swansea criticise TV coverage of Wrexham loss with rivals' owners as co-commentators
title: Swansea criticise TV coverage of Wrexham loss with rivals' owners as co-commentators
content: Swansea City chief executive Tom Gorringe criticises the television coverage of their Championship defeat at Wrexham, when the north Wales club's Hollywood owners were guest commentators.

originalTitle: Man Utd to make formal complaint over 'astonishing' penalty decisions
title: Man Utd to make formal complaint over 'astonishing' penalty decisions
content: Manchester United are left furious over "astonishing" refereeing decisions as two penalties were given  and one was not in their draw at Bournemouth.

originalTitle: 'The referee got it wrong' - Pundits disagree on Amad penalty claim
title: 'The referee got it wrong' - Pundits disagree on Amad penalty claim
content: Football Focus' Dion Dublin says he thinks "the referee got it wrong" and Manchester United should have been awarded a penalty when Amad Diallo appeared to be pulled back inside the box by Adrien Truffert.
